allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem data, viewer | Select-Object Name, Length; \(Get-Content viewer\\graph.data.js -TotalCount 2\))

PowerShell($txt = Get-Content cache\\sep\\articles\\kant-moral.txt -Raw; $q = "Kant's most influential positions in moral philosophy are found in The Groundwork of the Metaphysics of Morals"; $txt.Contains\($q\); $txt.Contains\("most influential positions in moral philosophy"\); $i = $txt.IndexOf\("most influential positions"\); if \($i -ge 0\) { $txt.Substring\($i - 60, 300\) })
